items.prompt: Before a Verilator UVM compile, you typically must…
choices: set UVM_HOME to Accellera UVM src and use the Makefile’s include paths
run only from the browser tools index
items.explain: UVM_HOME + includes let uvm_pkg compile with your test.

items.prompt: SIM=verilator in the course Makefile mainly…
choices: selects the Verilator compile/run recipe for the same TEST target
items.explain: SIM picks the simulator backend; TEST names the UVM test.

choices: which test class to execute inside uvm_pkg
which wave file to open automatically
items.explain: Build TEST= and runtime +UVM_TESTNAME must align.

items.prompt: A sensible first step in module 23 before a long compile is…
choices: make -n run SIM=verilator TEST=… to preview commands
unset UVM_HOME to test error messages only
expect browser lab pass to equal simulator pass
items.explain: Dry-run maps knobs without waiting for Verilator.

items.prompt: Running make from the wrong directory is a common cause of Makefile failures.
items.explain: Use the test folder that owns the Makefile.
